response.justification: The candidate has extensive experience in full-stack development, but the seniority level and experience (Senior Software Developer) do not match the job requirements (Junior/Mid-Level Fullstack Developer).
strengths: Experience with various tech stacks and databases
concerns: Seniority level is too high for the position
Lack of specific experience with React and Nest.js
Not clear if they are willing to work on a junior/mid-level position
